title: T-133 — UI: Dashboard Pipeline preview region (npd_dashboard prototype) NPD-e slice of T-052
prompt:
# T-133 — Dashboard pipeline preview slice

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §11.1, §11.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md NpdDashboard
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (NpdDashboard pipeline mini-view region)
Prototype-index entry: npd_dashboard
Parent root: T-052

## Goal
Single Client Component DashboardPipelinePreview: a compact recent-projects list (top 5-10) with current-gate status indicators (Badge dots) and a link to the full pipeline page. Consumes a recent-projects prop from parent; no DB call.

## Implementation contract
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/dashboard-pipeline-preview.tsx ('use client'). Props: { recentProjects: NpdProjectRow[] }.
- Render shadcn Card with header 'Pipeline (recent)' + view-all link to /(npd)/pipeline; body lists rows of project code, name, owner, and a gate-status Badge dot (todo/in-progress/blocked/done variants).
- Each row links to /(npd)/fa/[productCode] (or /pipeline/[projectId]).
- Empty state Card body when recentProjects.length === 0.
- No DB call inside the component (parent RSC provides projects).

## Files (≤ 2)
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/dashboard-pipeline-preview.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/__tests__/dashboard-pipeline-preview.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given DashboardPipelinePreview renders with a sample recentProjects list, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (pipeline preview region), then it shows a Card with header + view-all link + list of project rows with gate-status Badge dots using shadcn Card + Badge primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist
2. Given recentProjects.length === 0, when the panel renders, then an empty state Card body is shown — verified by RTL
3. Given a user clicks a row, when navigation triggers, then it routes to the correct FA detail (or pipeline) page — verified by RTL link assertion

## Test strategy
- RED: dashboard-pipeline-preview.test.tsx asserting Card structure + Badge dots + empty state + link target before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test dashboard-pipeline-preview'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call DB or Server Actions from the client component
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not exceed scope (1 component + 1 test)
